findings.description: The source has two separate h2 headings — 'HTTP/HTTPS通信' and 'JSONコンバータ' (each underlined with `=====`) — but the knowledge file merges both into a single section (s2). These are distinct topics with separate tables and content. They should be split into s2 and s3 respectively.
